nasb.text: Then from the family of the Danites, from Zorah and from Eshtaol, six hundred men armed with weapons of war set out.

esv.text: So 600 men of the tribe of Dan, armed with weapons of war, set out from Zorah and Eshtaol,

cnv.text: 於是但人的家族中有六百人，帶著兵器從那裡出發，就是從瑣拉和以實陶出發。

ccb.text: 但支派便从琐拉和以实陶派出六百个全副武装的人。
